parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Admin
participant ":System" as System

activate Admin
Admin -> System : Requests the vehicle maximum payload
activate System
System --> Admin : Asks for the vehicle ID
deactivate System

Admin -> System : Fills the information
activate System
System --> Admin : Validates and presents the vehicle maximum payload.
deactivate System
deactivate Admin
@enduml
```
